Bei Zhan ŚćĎśĻõ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bei Zhan (ŚćĎśĻõ)was born in Mo county, Hejian commandery. Noted for being scholarly. Recommended by Zhang He to Cao Rui. Bei Zhan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
